allow: Bash(python -c "from dhanhq import dhanhq; import inspect; attrs = [a for a in dir\(dhanhq\) if not a.startswith\(''_''\)]; print\([a for a in attrs if ''EQ'' in a.upper\(\) or ''NSE'' in a.upper\(\) or ''INSTR'' in a.upper\(\) or ''EQUITY'' in a.upper\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from dhanhq import dhanhq; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(dhanhq.intraday_minute_data\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from dhanhq import dhanhq; attrs = {a: getattr\(dhanhq, a\) for a in dir\(dhanhq\) if not a.startswith\(''_''\) and not callable\(getattr\(dhanhq, a\)\)}; print\(attrs\)")
Bash(python -c "from dhanhq import dhanhq; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(dhanhq.intraday_minute_data\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import dhanhq.marketfeed as mf; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(mf.DhanFeed.__init__\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import dhanhq.marketfeed as mf; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(mf.DhanFeed.connect\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import dhanhq.marketfeed as mf; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(mf\); print\(src\)")
